apps.title: TNSED Manarkeni
apps.summary:
Your journey of simple and enjoyable self-learning begins here!

Explore Math, Physics, Chemistry, Botany, and Zoology lessons aligned with the Tamil Nadu State Board syllabus through this engaging app. The content is delivered in the form of bi-lingual animated videos (Tamil & English) designed to make learning easy and enjoyable.

Understand concepts effortlessly and assess your knowledge with a quiz at the end of every video.

This app has been developed by the Tamil Nadu School Education Department as part of its digital learning initiative.

The app is now live with a rich collection of lessons, and new content is being added regularly. Stay tuned for updates as more subjects, videos, and quiz questions are continuously rolled out.

apps.title: TNSED Schools
apps.summary: The app will be used by the teachers, Heads of schools, and other administrative staff to enter student, staff and school data and track the same. The app currently has modules for entering students and staff attendance, modules for screening the health of the students and referring them to the doctors, module for identifying and tracking the out of school students and module for teachers to register for teacher training.

apps.title: TNSED ACiS
apps.summary:
Out of School Children Survey App – Tamil Nadu
The Out of School Children (OOSC) Survey App is a digital platform designed to support the
identification and tracking of children who are out of the formal education system across
Tamil Nadu.
Teachers and Block Resource Teacher Educators (BRTEs) in all blocks of the 38 districts will
use the app to survey students listed in the Common Pool and record their current status
along with the reasons for dropout.
The application enables accurate, real-time data collection and monitoring, helping the
Education Department take timely and targeted steps to bring every child back to school.

apps.title: TNSED Attendance
apps.summary: As part of the exercise to improve the efficiency of the various mobile applications and to simplify the update life cycle of various apps for the end user, the mobile based attendance has been separated from the main TNSED Schools app and deployed as a separate app on the play store. This will ensure better user experience and decreased number of updates for the staff of School Education Department, Government of Tamil Nadu.

apps.title: Illam Thedi Kalvi
apps.summary:
இல்லம் தேடிக் கல்வி ஒரு தன்னார்வ தொண்டு. கொரோனா பெருந்தொற்றுப் பரவல் சார்ந்த பொது முடக்க காலங்களில் அரசு பள்ளிகளில் ஒன்று முதல் எட்டாம் வகுப்பு வரை பயிலும் மாணவர்களின் கற்றல் இடைவெளி மற்றும் இழப்புகளை சரி செய்ய இல்லம் தேடிக் கல்வித் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்பட உள்ளது.



ILLAM THEDI KALVI is a volunteering initiative. In order to cater to the needs of the learning gap caused because of lockdowns due to the COVID outbreak, this initiative is being carried out by the School Education Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. All the volunteers can make use of the mobile application to access the features available for all the volunteers.

apps.title: TNSED Parents
apps.summary:
Parent App is an app created by the Tamil Nadu State Education Department with a goal of engaging parents and the larger community towards the development of schools.

Parents can access information about their children’s attendance, scholastic and co-scholastic performance. Feedback can be provided on the management of the school and welfare schemes and scholarships offered.

Parents can view all data about the school - student enrollment, teacher details and infrastructure.

Members of the School Management Committee can collect data of the school and surrounding habitation to plan for the development of the school. All parents of the school can access the resolutions passed by this committee.

Parents can offer feedback across various categories like infrastructure, safety, learning and welfare schemes.

Parents can access resources on child development, education schemes and career options to support their children.

apps.title: TNSED Admins
apps.summary: The TNSED Admins app is developed by TN EMIS for the purpose of carrying out School inspections and monitoring activities by all officials of the School Education Department. Basic data reporting will also be available through the app for adminstrative officers.

apps.title: TNSED Administrators
apps.summary: The EMIS monitoring app is developed by TN EMIS for the purpose of carrying out various inspections and monitoring activities by all officials of the School Education Department. Various components such as Classroom observation, Civil inspection, KGBV etc will be carried out using the app. Basic data reporting will also be available through the app for adminstrative officers.
